feat.name: Versatile Font
feat.text: As you explore your deity’s aspects, you move beyond restrictions on healing or harming. You can prepare either harm or heal in the spell slots gained from the harmful font or healing font.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.

feat.prerequisite: *harmful font or healing font*; deity that allows clerics to have both fonts
